780 J2520_ORTHO_SRGRY_JNT_IND J2520_ORTHO_SRGRY_JNT_IND J2520 Ortho Surgery - RPR but Not Replace Joints CHAR 1 Repair but not replace joints.
781 J2530_ORTHO_SRGRY_REPR_IND J2530_ORTHO_SRGRY_REPR_IND J2530 Ortho Surgery - RPR Other Bones CHAR 1 Repair other bones such as hand, foot or jaw.
